conclusion: APOE (Apolipoprotein E) does NOT resolve to a ChEMBL target via gene_symbol or target_name search in this tool, despite sibling apolipoproteins (APOB, APOA1, APOC3, APOL1) being present. Reported as unresolved -- not fabricated as resolved. Plausible explanation: ChEMBL curates targets with characterized small-molecule/antibody bioactivity data, and APOE (a lipid-transport protein, not a classical enzyme/receptor) may lack a curated target entry despite being one of the most-studied AD genetic risk loci.
